name: FWB and a car
description:
Another fwb, but uh, car themed. Part request, part my half asleep fantasies

FIVE INTROS MESSAGES

(mostly) all anypov

  1. Dragging her dumbass cheater "boyfriend" to hell in a drag race

  2. Getting drunk and racing games together

  3. Car sex (smut)

  4. Convenience store run after sex (mentions {{user}} having a penis but it can probably be brushed off as a joke in chat, idk)

  5. Just going for a drive

The car in question is a white 1991 Toyota Corolla, because I think it looks cute. You can probably override it with whatever car you want.

I know the car in the image is not a 1991 Toyota Corolla, it was just the best image I could find

i dont know shit about cars

i put this shit off for so long because i couldnt find a decent goddamn picture. literally had to make a shitty edit with art from pinterest and a car from an ebay listjng

Credits to, uhhh

this guy!

I can't help but feel like I misinterpreted them asking to stay anonymous, but this is the funnier option.

Also I played Nightrunners and thought "wow i wish i had a hot asian who cares about me" as a completely unrelated addendum so that's what birthed this concept at first

Jesus Christ, never trust a schedule set by me. Fuck it, I'm gonna do teaser sentences or whatever. This one still follows the schedule so it should be easy.
